steps.title: Interpret the equation components
steps.content: Since $t$ represents years after 1990, the input $t = 25$ corresponds to the year $1990 + 25 = 2015$. The output $P(25) = 560$ indicates the population value is 560.

steps.title: Match to the correct interpretation
steps.content: The equation $P(25) = 560$ predicts that the snow leopard population is 560 in the year 2015. That confirms C is correct.
